rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Waste in material or time indicates process improvement opportunity.
suggestedActions: Optimize drying/cooling parameters for cycle time reduction.
Monitor defects and adjust process conditions accordingly.

description.short: Calculate fabric weight per meter using GSM and width.
description.long: Calculate fabric weight per meter using GSM and width.

short_i18n.en: Calculate fabric weight per meter using GSM and width.
short_i18n.tr: 1 metre kumaşın ağırlığını gramaj ve en bilgisine göre hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie das Stoffgewicht pro Meter mit GSM und Breite.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le poids du tissu par mètre à l'aide du GSM et de la largeur.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el peso de la tela por metro usando GSM y ancho.
short_i18n.ar: احسب وزن القماش لكل متر باستخدام GSM والعرض.
